vocab.meaning: công việc có thu nhập ổn định
vocab.example: I am currently in gainful employment at a local tech firm, where I serve as a junior developer.

vocab.meaning: quá trình học hỏi khó khăn (đòi hỏi nỗ lực lớn trong thời gian ngắn)
vocab.example: Starting my master's degree presented a steep learning curve, especially regarding advanced statistical analysis.

vocab.meaning: kỳ nghỉ phép dài hạn để nghiên cứu hoặc nghỉ ngơi
vocab.example: I've actually taken a professional sabbatical from my corporate job to return to university for a year.
My primary focus as a student right now is to build a solid foundational knowledge of civil law.

vocab.meaning: những rủi ro/nguy hiểm đặc thù của nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: Being a full-time surgeon, I'm well aware of the occupational hazards, such as high stress and long hours.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động/đam mê học thuật
vocab.example: Most of my time is dedicated to scholarly pursuits, particularly researching renewable energy sources.

vocab.meaning: quỹ đạo/lộ trình phát triển sự nghiệp
vocab.example: I believe this specific degree will significantly alter my career trajectory for the better.

vocab.meaning: việc học nghề thông qua thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: Rather than a standard lecture-based course, I opted for a hands-on apprenticeship in carpentry.
The goal of my current training is to reach a high level of vocational competence in automotive engineering.
Managing a team of ten people is one of my core responsibilities in my current administrative role.
